title: env/file: put() returns NotFound for unsupported operation
description: secretx-env/src/lib.rs put() returns SecretError::NotFound, which means 'the secret does not exist.' The actual meaning is 'this backend does not support writes.' The same issue applies to secretx-file on non-Unix (permissions) and to wolfhsm. Trigger: caller calls put() on env backend → receives NotFound, retries with a different name, loops forever. Should be SecretError::Unavailable (env vars not writable) or SecretError::Backend with a message explaining the constraint.
